name: Pixar
description: Toy Story, WALL-E, and the Pixar animated universe

questions.q: In 'Finding Nemo,' what is the name of the forgetful blue tang fish who helps Marlin?

source.notes: Voiced by Ellen DeGeneres. Got her own spinoff 'Finding Dory' (2016).

questions.q: Who is the one-eyed green monster in 'Monsters, Inc.'?

source.notes: Voiced by Billy Crystal. His roommate/partner is James P. 'Sulley' Sullivan.

questions.q: What is the name of the rookie race car hero in 'Cars'?

source.notes: Voiced by Owen Wilson. Number 95 is a reference to 1995 (Toy Story's release).

questions.q: In 'Up,' what is the name of the elderly widower who ties balloons to his house?

source.notes: Voiced by Ed Asner. His late wife's name is Ellie.

questions.q: Which 2015 Pixar film takes place largely inside the mind of a young girl named Riley?

source.notes: Directed by Pete Docter. Emotions voiced by Amy Poehler, Phyllis Smith, Bill Hader, Lewis Black, Mindy Kaling.

questions.q: Who is the rat with a passion for cooking in the 2007 film 'Ratatouille'?

source.notes: Voiced by Patton Oswalt. Controls Linguini by pulling his hair.

questions.q: In 'Coco' (2017), what is the name of the young boy who travels to the Land of the Dead?

source.notes: Miguel Rivera. The film is set during Día de los Muertos.

questions.q: Which Pixar film features a Scottish princess named Merida?

source.notes: Released 2012. First Pixar film with a female protagonist. Won Best Animated Feature Oscar.

questions.q: What is the name of WALL-E's love interest in the 2008 Pixar film?

source.notes: Extraterrestrial Vegetation Evaluator. Sent to Earth to find plant life.

questions.q: What was Pixar's first feature-length film, released in 1995?

source.notes: First fully computer-animated feature film. Directed by John Lasseter.

questions.q: Who is the voice of Woody in the Toy Story franchise?

source.notes: Hanks has voiced Woody in all 4 films (1995-2019).

questions.q: Who voices Buzz Lightyear in the Toy Story films?

source.notes: Allen played Buzz through Toy Story 4. Chris Evans voiced him in 'Lightyear' (2022).

questions.q: Which Pixar film features superheroes in a world where supers have been forced into hiding?

source.notes: Directed by Brad Bird. Won Best Animated Feature 2004.

questions.q: Which Pixar film features Joy, Sadness, Anger, Fear, and Disgust as main characters?

source.notes: The emotions were inspired by psychologist Paul Ekman's theory of basic emotions.

questions.q: Which Pixar movie centers around two elf brothers named Ian and Barley on a quest to bring back their father?

source.notes: Released 2020. Voiced by Tom Holland and Chris Pratt.

questions.q: In which Pixar film does Lightning McQueen get stranded in the sleepy town of Radiator Springs?

source.notes: Inspired by Route 66. Doc Hudson voiced by Paul Newman in his last theatrical role.

questions.q: What is Sulley's job title at Monsters Incorporated?

source.notes: James P. Sullivan is the #1 Top Scarer, voiced by John Goodman.

questions.q: In 'Up,' what is the name of the talking dog with the translating collar?

source.notes: Golden Retriever. 'I have just met you, and I love you.'

questions.q: Who voices the happy emotion 'Joy' in 'Inside Out'?

source.notes: Poehler also voiced Joy in 'Inside Out 2' (2024).

questions.q: What Disney subsidiary acquired Pixar in 2006?

source.notes: Disney acquired Pixar for $7.4 billion. Steve Jobs became Disney's largest individual shareholder.
